The health benefits of Orthosiphon aristatus include its diuretic properties, which can help to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The bioactive constituents of Orthosiphon aristatus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Orthosiphon aristatus include tea infusions, capsules, and tablets, which are used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and urinary tract infections.
